findings.title: Plan deviation: shelf logic extracted into LibraryShelves.tsx rather than inline in Library.tsx
findings.summary: Plan Unit 1 called for inline const arrays in Library.tsx; implementation extracted a dedicated component. Deviation is reasonable but undocumented in plan/story notes.

findings.title: Unit test path diverges from plan (LibraryShelves.test.tsx vs Library.shelves.test.tsx)
findings.summary: Test colocated with component rather than the page-level path specified in the plan. Trace-completeness nit only.

findings.title: LibraryShelves component is exported but never mounted, leaving it dead on /library
findings.summary: After the F1 fix, Library.tsx comments out the <LibraryShelves /> mount pending real shelf data wiring. The story's AC is that shelves render on /library; currently they do not. Either mount behind a feature flag for dev visibility, wire real data, or record this as a follow-up story so the shipped component is not orphaned.
